LEGAL DESCRIPTION

THAT PART OF THE SOUTH HALF OF THE SOUTHWEST QUARTER AND THE SOUTH
HALF OF THE SOUTHEAST QUARTER OF SECTION 23, TOWNSHIP 2 SOUTH, RANGE 6
EAST, OF THE GILA AND SALT RIVER MERIDIAN, MARICOPA COUNTY, ARIZONA,

MORE PARTICULARLY DESCRIBED AS FOLLOWS:

COMMENCING AT THE SOUTHWEST CORNER OF SAID SECTION 23:

THENCE NORTH 00° 26'07" WEST, ALONG THE WEST LINE OF THE SOUTHWEST
QUARTER OF SAID SECTION 23, A DISTANCE OF 1,333.92 FEET TO THE NORTHWEST
CORNER OF THE SOUTH HALF OF THE SOUTHWEST QUARTER OF SAID SECTION 23:
THENCE NORTH 89°51'24" EAST, ALONG THE NORTH LINE OF THE SOUTH HALF OF
THE SOUTHWEST QUARTER OF SAID SECTION 23, A DISTANCE OF 1,979.69 FEET TO
THE TRUE POINT OF BEGINNING;

THENCE CONTINUING NORTH 89°51'24" EAST, ALONG SAID NORTH LINE, A DISTANCE
OF 648.78 FEET;

THENCE SOUTH 00° 08'36" EAST, A DISTANCE OF 175.65 FEET;

THENCE SOUTH 76°59'50" EAST, A DISTANCE OF 10.90 FEET TO THE BEGINNING OF A
TANGENT CURVE OF 300.00 FOOT RADIUS, CONCAVE NORTHEASTERLY:

FINAL PLAT

"SEVILLE PARCEL 3"

BEING A RESUBDIVISION OF A PORTION OF "SEVILLE" TRACT
AS RECORDED IN BOOK 553, PAGE 15 ,MARICOPA COUNTY RECORDS, LOCATED IN
A PORTION OF SECTION 23, TOWNSHIP 2 SOUTH, RANGE 6 EAST
OF THE GILA AND SALT RIVER MERIDIAN, MARICOPA COUNTY, ARIZONA.

hye

DEVELOPER

SHEA HOMES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
8800 N. GAINEY CENTER DRIVE

SUITE 350

SCOTTSDALE, ARIZONA 85258
PHONE : (480) 348-6000

FAX: (480) 948-8397

 

DEDICATION

STATE OF ARIZONA
COUNTY OF MARICOPA )
KNOW ALL MEN BY THESE PRESENTS:

THAT SHEA HOMES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, AS
OWNER, HAS SUBDIVIDED, UNDER THE NAME OF "SEVILLE PARCEL 3", BEING A
RESUBDIVISION OF A PORTION OF "SEVILLE" TRACT "H", AS RECORDED IN BOOK

553, PAGE 15 ,MARICOPA COUNTY RECORDS, LOCATED IN A PORTION

OF SECTION 23, TOWNSHIP 2 SOUTH, RANGE 6 EAST, OF THE

GILA AND SALT RIVER MERIDIAN, MARICOPA COUNTY, ARIZONA AS SHOWN HEREON AND
HEREBY PUBLISHES THIS PLAT AS AND FOR THAT PLAT OF SAID "SEVILLE PARCEL 3"
AND HEREBY DECLARES THAT SAID PLAT SETS FORTH THE LOCATION AND GIVES THE
DIMENSIONS OF THE LOTS, STREETS, TRACTS AND EASEMENTS CONSTITUTING SAME
AND THAT EACH LOT, STREET AND TRACT SHALL BE KNOWN BY THE NUMBER, NAME
OR LETTER THAT IS GIVEN EACH RESPECTIVELY ON SAID PLAT.

THAT SHEA HOMES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP,

AS OWNER, HEREBY DEDICATES TO THE PUBLIC, FOR USE AS SUCH, THE STREETS
AND EASEMENTS AS SHOWN AND INCLUDED IN THE ABOVE DESCRIBED PREMISES.
EASEMENTS ARE DEDICATED FOR THE PURPOSES SHOWN.

TRACTS 'A’ THROUGH 'I', ARE HEREBY DECLARED TO BE COMMON AREAS FOR THE
USE AND ENJOYMENT OF THE SEVILLE PROPERTY OWNERS.

A PUBLIC ACCESS EASEMENT IS HEREBY DEDICATED OVER TRACTS 'A'®& 'H'.

LANDSCAPE MAINTENANCE WILL BE BY THE SEVILLE MASTER HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION.
NO DWELLING UNITS SHALL BE CONSTRUCTED ON SAID TRACTS.

SS

THENCE NORTH 76° 38'40" WEST, A DISTANCE OF 201.37 FEET TO THE BEGINNING OF
A TANGENT CURVE OF 500.00 FOOT RADIUS, CONCAVE NORTHEASTERLY:

THENCE NORTHWESTERLY, ALONG SAID CURVE, THROUGH A CENTRAL ANGLE OF
76° 38'40", A DISTANCE OF 668.85 FEET;

CE NRING OTe 00°00'00" EAST, A DISTANCE OF 321.21FEET TO THE TRUE POINT OF

CONTAINING 23.592 ACRES, MORE OR LESS.

NOTES

. CONSTRUCTION WITHIN PUBLIC UTILITY EASEMENTS EXCEPT BY PUBLIC AGENCIES AND UTILITY
COMPANIES SHALL BE LIMITED TO UTILITIES AND WOOD, WIRE OR REMOVABLE SECTION TYPE
FENCING.

. ALL UTILITIES SHALL BE CONSTRUCTED UNDERGROUND.

. ELECTRIC LINES TO BE CONSTRUCTED UNDERGROUND AS REQUIRED BY THE ARIZONA
CORPORATION COMMISSION.

. THE TOWN OF GILBERT IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR AND WILL NOT ACCEPT MAINTENANCE

OF ANY PRIVATE STREETS, PRIVATE UTILITIES, PRIVATE FACILITIES AND PRIVATE
LANDSCAPED AREAS WITHIN THE PROJECT. ALL LANDSCAPING WITHIN THIS PROJECT IS
TO BE MAINTAINED BY THE SEVILLE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION.

. NO STRUCTURES SHALL BE CONSTRUCTED IN OR ACROSS, NOR SHALL OTHER
IMPROVEMENTS OR ALTERATIONS BE MADE TO THE DRAINAGE FACILITIES THAT ARE A
PART OF THIS DEVELOPMENT WITHOUT THE WRITTEN AUTHORIZATION OF THE TOWN OF
GILBERT.

. ALL RETENTION BASINS MUST DRAIN ANY STORM EVENT ONSITE RUNOFF UP TO AND INCLUDING
THE SO-YEAR STORM WITHIN 36 HOURS. OWNER(S) OF ANY BASIN FAILING TO MEET THIS
REQUIREMENT MUST TAKE CORRECTIVE ACTION TO BRING THE BASIN INTO COMPLIANCE.

. ALL PROPERTIES PLATTED HEREON ARE SUBJECT TO AN ANNUAL STREET LIGHT
IMPROVEMENT DISTRICT ASSESSMENT.

. ZONE X BASE 100 YEAR FLOOD ELEV. SHOWN PER FIRM FLOOD INSURANCE RATE
MAP NUMBER 04013C3075F, MAP REVISED DEC.,1993

. THIS DEVELOPMENT IS LOCATED WITHIN THE TOWN OF GILBERT WATER SERVICE
AREA AND HAS BEEN DESIGNATED AS HAVING AN ASSURED WATER SUPPLY IN
ACCORDANCE WITH A.R.S. 45-576.
